bridge.title: Ship Bridge
bridge.text: Alarms blare on the starship Horizon. Hull breach detected. What is your orders, captain?

engineering.title: Engineering Bay
engineering.text: Sparks fly from the reactor. You grab a portable shield generator before the corridor seals.

crew_quarters.title: Crew Quarters
crew_quarters.text: The crew reports an alien vessel docking. Diplomacy or a direct approach?

airlock.title: Outer Airlock
airlock.text: Radiation floods the airlock. Only a shield can protect you outside the hull.

hull_exterior.title: Hull Walk
hull_exterior.text: You patch the breach manually. The ship is saved — but you're exposed.

alien_vessel.title: Alien Bridge
alien_vessel.text: Translators hum to life. The aliens offer peace if you share star charts.

boarding.title: Hostile Boarding
boarding.text: You storm the alien ship with a plasma blade. Victory — but at what cost?

debris.title: Floating Debris
debris.text: You hide among wreckage until oxygen runs low. Rescue never comes.

escape_pod.title: Escape Pod
escape_pod.text: You jettison in the pod. The Horizon explodes behind you.

peace_treaty.title: Galactic Peace
peace_treaty.text: A treaty is signed. Two species share the stars in harmony.

rescue.title: Heroic Rescue
rescue.text: The crew pulls you inside. You saved the ship and became a legend.
